privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: TestingWithEkki ("we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting your personal data in compliance with the Indonesian Personal Data Protection Law (UU PDP) and other applicable regulations. This policy explains how we collect, use, process, and protect your information.

definitions.title: 1. Definitions
items: **Personal Data**: Any data about a person, whether identified or identifiable, individually or combined with other information.
**Data Subject**: The individual to whom the personal data attaches.
**Processing**: The collection, processing, analysis, storage, correction, display, dissemination, and/or erasure of personal data.

lawfulBasis.title: 2. Lawful Basis for Processing
lawfulBasis.content: We process your personal data based on the following valid legal grounds:
items: **Consent**: You have given explicit consent for specific purposes (e.g., account creation, newsletter).
**Contractual Necessity**: Processing is necessary to provide the services you requested (e.g., tracking course progress).
**Legal Obligation**: Compliance with applicable laws and regulations in Indonesia.

whatWeCollect.title: 3. What We Collect
items: **Account Information**: Name, email address, username, and profile picture (via OAuth).
**Learning Data**: Progress on challenges, code submissions, XP, and achievements.
**Technical Data**: IP address, browser type, device information, and usage logs for security and analytics.

howWeUse.title: 4. How We Use and Disclose Data
items: To provide and maintain the generic learning platform services.
To notify you about changes to our service or your account.
To monitor usage and detect technical issues.
We do **not** sell your personal data. We may share data with trusted third-party service providers (Google, Supabase) solely for operational purposes.

dataSubjectRights.title: 5. Your Rights (Data Subject Rights)
dataSubjectRights.content: Under UU PDP, you have the right to:
items: **Access**: Request a copy of your personal data.
**Rectify**: Correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
**Erase**: Request deletion of your data ("Right to be Forgotten"), subject to legal retention obligations.
**Restrict**: Request restriction of processing specifically.
**Withdraw Consent**: Withdraw consent for data processing at any time.

dataRetention.title: 6. Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We retain your personal data only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, including for the purposes of satisfying any legal, accounting, or reporting requirements. Typically, account data is kept until you request deletion.

security.title: 7. Data Security
security.content: We implement industry-standard security measures (encryption, access controls) to protect your data. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

contact.title: 8. Contact & Complaints
contact.content: To exercise your rights or if you have questions about this policy, please contact our Data Protection Office at: **ekki@testingwithekki.com**.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: Welcome to TestingWithEkki. By accessing or using our website, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing this website, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to these Terms. If you do not agree, strictly do not use this site.

useLicense.title: 2. Use License & Intellectual Property
useLicense.content: All content (tutorials, code challenges, text, graphics) is the property of TestingWithEkki or its licensors. You are granted a limited, non-exclusive license to access the material for personal, non-commercial learning purposes. You may not reproduce or redistribute the content without permission.

userObligations.title: 3. User Obligations
items: Use the platform for any illegal purpose.
Attempt to reverse engineer any software contained on the website.
Harass, abuse, or harm another person or group.
Spam or upload malicious code.

disclaimer.title: 4. Disclaimer & Limitation of Liability
disclaimer.content: The materials on TestingWithEkki are provided "as is". We make no warranties, expressed or implied. In no event shall TestingWithEkki be liable for any damages arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on this website.

governingLaw.title: 5. Governing Law
governingLaw.content: These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the **Republic of Indonesia**. You irrevocably submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in that location.

changes.title: 6. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the website signifies your acceptance of the updated terms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Have questions, feedback, or want to collaborate? Reach out!

hire.title: Open for Opportunities
hire.description: Looking for a Senior QA Engineer, SDET, or Test Architect? I help teams build reliable, high-quality software.
